summary: Completed testing of Event Management Enhancements (iteration 17). All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Admin EventsAdmin modal has Upload Image button, Upload Brochure button, Venue Google Maps Link input, NO Speaker Details field. Admin event list shows image thumbnails, brochure icons (📄), and Map links. Public EventsPage displays event images, Download Brochure button (green styling), View on Map link with ExternalLink icon. speaker_details removed from frontend display.

minor.issue: Existing events in DB still contain 'speaker_details' field from before migration. New events don't include it.

critical_code_review_comments: Event and EventCreate models correctly updated with venue_map_link, no speaker_details
EventsAdmin.jsx: Upload Image calls /api/public/upload-photo, Upload Brochure calls /api/public/upload-pdf correctly
EventsPage.jsx: Properly resolves image URLs (handles both absolute http and relative /api/uploads paths)
Email template correctly includes venue_map_link variable
WhatsApp template includes venue_map_link in event_registered message

context_for_next_testing_agent: Event management enhancements fully tested. Key test event: 'VII ANNUAL CONVENTION OF AMST AND NATIONAL CONFERENCE' has image_url, brochure_url, and venue_map_link set. Upload endpoints: /api/public/upload-photo for images, /api/public/upload-pdf for brochures. venue_map_link should be Google Maps URL format. Legacy events may still have speaker_details in DB but new events won't include it.
